text: As I stand at the threshold of this room, I am struck by the clarity of the glass separating spaces and the orderly calm that pervades the environment. It is a place designed for contemplation and invention—a fusion of structure and possibility. The visible fire extinguisher is a reminder of the precautions embedded in our lives, even in spaces dedicated to progress. Here, I feel anticipation, mingled with an undercurrent of curiosity about what lies just beyond the transparent barrier.
